# btpservice_cicd_repository_jobs (Data Source)

Lists all jobs configured for a specific repository in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_repository_jobs" "all" {
  repository = "my-repository"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `repository` (String) The name or ID of the repository whose jobs are listed.

### Read-Only

- `values` (Attributes List) The list of jobs configured for the repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the job is active. Inactive jobs cannot be executed.
- `branch` (String) Branch pattern the job is executed for.
- `build_retention_days` (Number) Number of days builds of this job are retained.
- `description` (String) Description of the job.
- `id` (String) Immutable technical ID of the job.
- `max_builds_to_keep` (Number) Maximum number of builds retained for this job.
- `name` (String) Name of the job.
- `notification_configuration` (Attributes) Notification configuration for the job. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--notification_configuration))
- `pipeline` (String) Pipeline type of the job (e.g. `sap-cloud-sdk`, `cpi`).
- `pipeline_parameters` (Map of String) Key-value parameters for the pipeline.
- `pipeline_version` (String) Version of the pipeline type.
- `repository_id` (String) ID of the source repository used by the job.

<a id="nestedatt--values--notification_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values.notification_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `ans` (Attributes) SAP Alert Notification Service configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--notification_configuration--ans))

<a id="nestedatt--values--notification_configuration--ans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values.notification_configuration.ans`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether alert notification is active.
- `credential_id` (String) ID of the credential containing the ANS service key.
- `custom_tag` (String) Custom tag value for the SAP Alert Notification Service.
